title: RBI Penalty on NBFCs and Housing Finance Company for Fair Practices Code Non-Compliance
description: <cite index="21-3,21-4">The RBI imposed a total penalty of ₹12 lakh on two non-banking financial companies (NBFCs) and one housing finance company (HFC) for failing to comply with regulatory directions.</cite> <cite index="21-6,21-8,21-9">Five Star Business Finance was penalised ₹6.20 lakh for non-compliance with KYC directions and fair practices code, while Can Fin Homes was fined ₹2.70 lakh for failing to clearly disclose the breakup of loan instalments between principal and interest components.</cite>
